description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/nickdonnelly/horus/git-mirror:latest. Define a single stage called mirror. Add a job named Gitlab to Github that runs in the mirror stage and executes the shell command git-mirror "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}" git@github.com:${GITHUB_REPOSITORY} to mirror the repository to GitHub. The job has no caches, artifacts, services, or special rules, so it runs on every pipeline execution.
